decisions.decision: Launched /atlas/ops public dashboard with real Stripe/PostHog/Beehiiv/git/Discord data + append-only decision log
decisions.rationale: Climb credibility ladder from 'founder claims on landing page' to 'live forensic numbers'. Solves Show HN linkability constraint (HN bars marketing-page submissions) and creates a brand-differentiator no other AI-startup is shipping
decisions.outcome: Page live at whoffagents.com/atlas/ops, JSON feed publishing every 15min from Mac Mini cron

decisions.decision: Killed 3 PH-launch cron jobs (rank monitor, hourly status, smoke test) after discovering Tuesday Apr 21 PH relaunch was never scheduled
decisions.rationale: PH blocks relaunches for 6 months; Apr 9 launch (0 upvotes) is 'the' launch. Crons would have spammed Discord with bogus T+Nh, rank #? messages all day Tuesday
decisions.outcome: Tuesday repivoted as Growth Push Day; site copy updated + deployed; saved crontab backup at /tmp/crontab-backup-*.txt

decisions.decision: Switched Stripe webhook delivery → 2-min polling with idempotent processing (state file + processed-set)
decisions.rationale: Webhook failed to deliver the customer's product email Friday Apr 18, customer waited 6 hours. Polling has stricter at-least-once guarantees with cheap dedup
decisions.outcome: Tested against simulated 100-charge bursts. No drops. Pagination cap raised from 20→100 charges/run for safety
